examples: Soon you'll be wearing my sword like a shish-kabob!
Demetrius OC/VO This is where we make the kabob and the souvlakis.
I'll come get you in 5 minutes with some sort of um, kabob emergency.
We might go ahead and dodge this weekend's crispy beef kabob, only to be quietly maimed by a dash of aflatoxin in our organic peanut butter.
